consistency.data_structure: Structure is typical for spell data, containing all expected mechanical fields (level, school, casting time, etc.).
consistency.terminology: Uses standard D&D 5e terminology (action, saving throw, concentration, V, S, Dash, frightened, unconscious, disadvantage).

quality.completeness: Complete. Contains all necessary components for spell functionality.
quality.clarity: Clear, though the complexity arises from the multiple effect choices. The descriptions for Asleep, Panicked, and Sickened are precise regarding triggers and resolutions.
quality.cross_references: References standard conditions/states: [unconscious](#unconscious), [frightened](#frightened). The self-reference to [_eyebite_](#eyebite) for targeting restriction is correctly formatted.

mechanics.level_and_school: Level 6 Necromancy. Fits thematic requirements for potent mind/life manipulation.
mechanics.casting: Action, Self-cast, V/S components. Standard for powerful battlefield control.
mechanics.duration_and_concentration: Concentration up to 1 minute. Appropriate for a potent ongoing control spell.
mechanics.target_and_recasting: Targets one creature within 60ft. Crucially, the caster can use their action on subsequent turns to switch targets, *unless* the new target previously saved against this casting. This makes the spell highly flexible for area denial against multiple enemies, provided they fail their initial save.

effects_comparison.mechanic: Incapacitation via Unconscious state. Requires damage or action to wake.
effects_comparison.assessment: Very powerful lockdown, comparable to high-level sleep effects.

effects_comparison.mechanic: Forced movement (Dash away) and Frightened condition. Ends if target moves 60ft away and cannot see caster.
effects_comparison.assessment: Excellent battlefield separation tool. Can force enemies out of position or into hazardous areas.

effects_comparison.mechanic: Disadvantage on attacks/checks, allows a Wisdom save at the end of each turn to end the effect.
effects_comparison.assessment: Weaker crowd control, functioning as a sustained debuff that the target actively works to shed. Good for grinding down a single resilient target.

mechanics.power_level_assessment: A versatile, single-target control spell that scales well by allowing target switching, making it strong against groups of minions or effectively neutralizing one high-priority target for multiple turns.
